table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Additional information about the element
Legend for this format

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Base logical model providing the common schema metadata interface inherited by all SMART Guidelines logical models. Every SMART Guidelines logical model schema derives from this base, which documents the shared FHIR and JSON-LD metadata properties used by the JSON Schema generation pipeline.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

a.title: Le nom logique de l'élément

a.title: أسطورة لهذا التنسيق

p.b: Generated Narrative: 结构定义 FHIRSchemaBase

table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Base logical model providing the common schema metadata interface inherited by all SMART Guidelines logical models. Every SMART Guidelines logical model schema derives from this base, which documents the shared FHIR and JSON-LD metadata properties used by the JSON Schema generation pipeline.

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

a.title: Legend for this format

description.value: Base logical model providing the common schema metadata interface inherited by all SMART Guidelines logical models. Every SMART Guidelines logical model schema derives from this base, which documents the shared FHIR and JSON-LD metadata properties used by the JSON Schema generation pipeline.

definition.value: Base logical model providing the common schema metadata interface inherited by all SMART Guidelines logical models. Every SMART Guidelines logical model schema derives from this base, which documents the shared FHIR and JSON-LD metadata properties used by the JSON Schema generation pipeline.
The FHIR resource type identifying this logical model resource
Canonical URI of the FHIR StructureDefinition that defines this logical model
The FHIR parent base type from which this logical model is derived (serialised as 'fhir:parent' in JSON)
ValueSet identifiers used in this logical model for JSON-LD context generation (serialised as 'jsonld:valuesets' in JSON)
JSON-LD context template for this logical model (serialised as 'jsonld:contextTemplate' in JSON)

Base logical model providing the common schema metadata interface inherited by all SMART Guidelines logical models. Every SMART Guidelines logical model schema derives from this base, which documents the shared FHIR and JSON-LD metadata properties used by the JSON Schema generation pipeline.
The FHIR resource type identifying this logical model resource
Canonical URI of the FHIR StructureDefinition that defines this logical model
The FHIR parent base type from which this logical model is derived (serialised as 'fhir:parent' in JSON)
ValueSet identifiers used in this logical model for JSON-LD context generation (serialised as 'jsonld:valuesets' in JSON)
JSON-LD context template for this logical model (serialised as 'jsonld:contextTemplate' in JSON)
